channel.title: Generative AI on Rafelia's AI LOLs
channel.description: Recent content in Generative AI on Rafelia's AI LOLs

item.title: 🤖 Is AI Making Us Dumb? 🧠💨
item.description: A new study from Microsoft & Carnegie Mellon suggests AI could be making us mentally lazy. Are we outsourcing too much thinking to AI?

item.title: About Me: Rafelia’s Tech & AI Journey 🚀
item.description: From hunting bugs to mastering ML, AI, GenAI, and DL—Rafelia’s journey is about innovating, simplifying, and making tech fun!
